description: List BIM Model Revision Viewpoints associated to a BIM model revision

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[bim_model_revision_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching Bim Model Revision ids.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) within a specific updated at iso8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The compact view contains only ids.
The extended view contains the response shown below.
The normal view contains bim_viewpoint_id instead of object.
The default view is normal.

parameters.name: viewpoint_format
parameters.description:
Specify viewpoint data format. This parameter functions only when the query parameter view is 'extended'
The default format returns the viewpoint content as saved.
The procore format returns the vi...

200.description: BIM Model Revision Viewpoints listed successfully

403.description: User does not have permission to view BIM Model Revision Viewpoints
